text:
n Astavarga, which invariably gave rise to too many

enemies, who wished for his early death.
His fifth house for disciples is very weak. Some of his disciples cheated, duped and
tried to poison him.
He never could leave or produce a worthy successor. He could not produce someone in
the caliber of Swami Vivekanada.
His disciples were mediocre in spiritual growth, and after his death they fought and
made life miserable for many others too. This is because the 5th lord of disciples is in
the 8th house of problems and controversy.
His 5th house had Ketu. He had lot of foreign disciples and Ketu represents women
.He never got married officially because his seventh lord, in both rasi and navamsha
charts, are afflicted.
His 1st and 8th lords were connected hence Osho was able to die a conscious death. In
his final discourse he said, "I am leaving a dream".
The power of Rajni Kanth! -
Tuesday, 28 January, 2003, 00:00
